message.content: The screenshot shows a clean, minimalist anime website interface with a two-column layout. On the left side, there's a vertical filter sidebar containing various filtering options. The sidebar appears to have a light gray background and includes sections for different filter categories, though specific text isn't visible in this view. The right side displays anime search results in a grid format, with each result showing an anime poster image, title, and possibly other details like episode count or rating. The overall design uses a white background with subtle gray elements, creating a clean and organized appearance typical of anime database or streaming websites. The interface seems designed for easy navigation and filtering of anime content, with the left sidebar allowing users to narrow down their search by various criteria while the right side presents the matching results.
